name: golang-github-golang-groupcache-dev
title: golang-github-golang-groupcache-dev
summary: caching and cache-filling library, a replacement for memcached
description:
caching and cache-filling library, a replacement for memcached
Groupcache is a caching and cache-filling library, intended as a
replacement for memcached in many cases.
.
Like memcached, groupcache shards by key to select which peer is
responsible for that key.  Unlike memcached, groupcache does not
require running a separate set of servers, comes with a cache
filling mechanism, and contains some other useful features.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-golang-groupcache-dev because caching and cache-filling library, a replacement for memcached.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-golang-groupcache-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-golang-groupcache-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-golang-groupcache-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
